SELECT toUInt64((SELECT count() FROM test_table_1)) AS count_as_uint64;
SELECT col1, toUInt64(col1) FROM test_table_1 WHERE toUInt64(col1) > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id UInt64, value String);
SELECT toUInt64(value) AS converted_value FROM test_table_2 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table_2 WHERE toUInt64(value) > 200);
SELECT SUM(toUInt64(value)) AS total_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table_2 WHERE id < 4);
